╰─$ cat ~/.config/hypr/components/binds.conf && echo "---AUDIO---" && which pactl && pactl list short sinks && echo "---BRIGHTNESS---" && which brightnessctl && brightnessctl info && echo "---SWAYOSD---" && which swayosd && echo "---COMPONENTS---" && ls -la ~/.config/hypr/components/
$mainMod = SUPER # Sets "Windows" key as main modifier
$BROWSER = firefox

# Cheat sheet
#bind = $mainMod, K, exec, sh -c "~/.config/hypr/scripts/cheatsheet.sh" # Show cheat sheet (THIS!)
# super remove command to close the selected program 
# bind = $mainMod,r,kill
# Logout
bind = $mainMod, ESCAPE, exec, wlogout # Launch power menu
#take a screenshot for a particualr window 
bind = $mainMod, Print, exec, grimblast copy active
#bind = Print, exec, sh -c "grim -g \"$(hyprctl activewindow -j | jq -r '.at | \"\(.[0]),\(.[1])\"') $(hyprctl activewindow -j | jq -r '.size | \"\(.[0])x\(.[1])\"')\" ~/Pictures/Screenshots/$(date +%Y-%m-%d_%H-%M-%S).png"
# Zoom
bind = $mainMod, mouse_down, exec, hyprctl -q keyword cursor:zoom_factor $(hyprctl getoption cursor:zoom_factor -j | jq '.float * 1.5')
bind = $mainMod, mouse_up, exec, hyprctl -q keyword cursor:zoom_factor $(hyprctl getoption cursor:zoom_factor -j | jq '(.float * 0.7) | if . < 1 then 1 else . end')
# Important stuff
bind = $mainMod SHIFT, P, exec, sh -c "~/.config/waybar/scripts/installer-wrapper.sh" # Package center
#bind = $mainMod,m, exec, sh -c "~/.config/waybar/scripts/quick-actions.sh" # Open quick actions
bind = $mainMod SHIFT, E, exec, sh -c 'rofi -show emoji -theme ~/.config/rofi/config.rasi' # Pick emojis

# Styling and utility
bind = $mainMod, q, exec, sh -c 'killall -9 waybar; waybar; ~/.config/hypr/scripts/restore-wallpaper.sh; killall nwg-dock-hyprland; notify-send -a "System" "Styles" "Reloaded styles" -i preferences-desktop' # Reload style
bind = $mainMod, W, exec, ~/.config/waybar/scripts/wallpaper-selector.sh # Select wallpaper
bind = $mainMod SHIFT, W, exec, ~/.config/waybar/scripts/wallpaper-selector.sh random # Apply random wallpaper
bind = $mainMod CTRL, V, exec, sh -c 'clipse-gui' # Open clipboard manager
bind = CTRL SHIFT, S, exec, sh -c '~/.config/waybar/scripts/take-screenshot.sh' # Take screenshot
bind = $mainMod, backslash, exec, sh -c '~/.config/waybar/scripts/color-picker.sh' # Color picker
bind = $mainMod, N, exec, sh -c ~/.config/waybar/scripts/wifi-menu.sh # Open wifi Manager
bind = $mainMod SHIFT, N, exec, sh -c 'sleep 0.1 && swaync-client -t -sw' # Open Notification Manager

# Terminals
bind = $mainMod, T, exec, $terminal # Open terminal
bind = $mainMod SHIFT, T, exec, $terminal --class floating --title floating # Open floating terminal
bind = $mainMod SHIFT, D, exec, sh -c "~/.config/hypr/scripts/dispatch-terminals.sh" # Open starter terminals
bind = CTRL SHIFT, E, exec, kitty --class floating --title floating -e sh -c "while true; do btop; sleep 0.1; done" & # Open system monitor

# Applications
bind = $mainMod, SPACE, exec, sh -c 'rofi -show drun -theme ~/.config/rofi/grid.rasi' # Application launcher
bind = $mainMod, E, exec, $fileManager # Open file manager
bind = $mainMod, I, exec, sh -c "codium --ozone-platform=wayland"  # Open VSCode
bind = $mainMod SHIFT, I, exec, kitty --class floating -e sh -c '~/.config/waybar/scripts/code-launcher.sh' # Open file in VSCode
bind = $mainMod, B, exec, $BROWSER # Open browser
bind = $mainMod, D, exec, vesktop # Open discord

# Window control
bindm = $mainMod, mouse:272, movewindow # Move window
bindm = $mainMod, mouse:273, resizewindow # Resize window
bind = $mainMod, Q, killactive, # Exit window
bind = $mainMod, M, exit, # Log out
bind = $mainMod, x, exec, hyprlock # Lock screen
bind = $mainMod, V, togglefloating, # Toggle floating terminal
bind = $mainMod, F, fullscreen, 1 # Full screen
bind = $mainMod SHIFT, F, fullscreen, 0 # Full screen

bind = $mainMod, P, pseudo, # Toggle pseudo tiling
bind = $mainMod SHIFT, J, togglesplit # Toggle tiling split
bind = $mainMod, h, movefocus, l # Move focus to left 
bind = $mainMod, l, movefocus, r # Move focus to right
bind = $mainMod, k, movefocus, u # Move focus up
bind = $mainMod, j, movefocus, d # Move focus down
# bind = $mainMod, S, togglespecialworkspace, magic # Toggle special workspace
# bind = $mainMod SHIFT, S, movetoworkspace, special:magic # Move to special workspace

# Workspaceis
bind = ALT SHIFT, Tab, hyprexpo:expo, toggle # Workspace view (Grid)
bind = ALT, bracketleft, exec, sh -c "~/.config/waybar/scripts/workspace-scroll.sh up" # Move down 1 workspace
bind = ALT, bracketright, exec, sh -c "~/.config/waybar/scripts/workspace-scroll.sh down" # Move up 1 workspace
bind = $mainMod, z, exec, sh -c "~/.config/waybar/scripts/workspace-scroll.sh up" # Move down 1 workspace
bind = $mainMod, x, exec, sh -c "~/.config/waybar/scripts/workspace-scroll.sh down" # Move up 1 workspace
bind = $mainMod SHIFT, z, exec, sh -c "$HOME/.config/hypr/scripts/move-column-fix.sh left" # Scroll left 
bind = $mainMod SHIFT, x, exec, sh -c "$HOME/.config/hypr/scripts/move-column-fix.sh right" # Scroll right
bind = $mainMod SHIFT, period, exec, sh -c "$HOME/.config/hypr/scripts/stack-column-fixed.sh right" # Move window right
bind = $mainMod SHIFT, comma, exec, sh -c "$HOME/.config/hypr/scripts/stack-column-fixed.sh left"# Move window left
bind = $mainMod, grave, exec, sh -c "$HOME/.config/waybar/scripts/layout-switcher.sh" # Set workspace layout
bind = $mainMod, minus, layoutmsg, colresize -0.1 # Reduce column size (scrolling)
bind = $mainMod, equal, layoutmsg, colresize +0.1 # Increase column size (scrolling)
bind = $mainMod SHIFT, up, resizeactive, 0 -20
bind = $mainMod SHIFT, down, resizeactive, 0 20
bind = $mainMod SHIFT, left, resizeactive, -20 0
bind = $mainMod SHIFT, right, resizeactive, 20 0

#Move to workspace with mainMod + [0-9]
  bind = $mainMod, 1, workspace, 1 # Move to wsp [0-9]
  bind = $mainMod, 2, workspace, 2 
  bind = $mainMod, 3, workspace, 3 
  bind = $mainMod, 4, workspace, 4 hyprctl dispatch layoutmsg setlayout dwindle
  bind = $mainMod, 5, workspace, 5 
  bind = $mainMod, 6, workspace, 6 
  bind = $mainMod, 7, workspace, 7 
  bind = $mainMod, 8, workspace, 8 
  bind = $mainMod, 9, workspace, 9
  bind = $mainMod, 0, workspace, 10

# Support for workspaces 11-20
  bind = $mainMod ALT, 1, workspace, 11 # Move to wsp [10-19
  bind = $mainMod ALT,  2, workspace, 12 
  bind = $mainMod ALT ,3, workspace, 13 
  bind = $mainMod ALT, 4, workspace, 14 
  bind = $mainMod ALT, 5, workspace, 15 
  bind = $mainMod ALT, 6, workspace, 16 
  bind = $mainMod ALT, 7, workspace, 17 
  bind = $mainMod ALT, 8, workspace, 18 
  bind = $mainMod ALT, 9, workspace, 19
  bind = $mainMod ALT, 0, workspace, 20

# Move active window to a workspace with mainMod + SHIFT + [0-9]
  bind = $mainMod SHIFT, 1, movetoworkspace, 1 # Move win to wsp [0-9]
  bind = $mainMod SHIFT, 2, movetoworkspace, 2
  bind = $mainMod SHIFT, 3, movetoworkspace, 3
  bind = $mainMod SHIFT, 4, movetoworkspace, 4
  bind = $mainMod SHIFT, 5, movetoworkspace, 5
  bind = $mainMod SHIFT, 6, movetoworkspace, 6
  bind = $mainMod SHIFT, 7, movetoworkspace, 7
  bind = $mainMod SHIFT, 8, movetoworkspace, 8
  bind = $mainMod SHIFT, 9, movetoworkspace, 9
  bind = $mainMod SHIFT, 0, movetoworkspace, 1

# Move active window to a workspace, support for workspaces 11-20
  bind = $mainMod ALT SHIFT, 1, movetoworkspace, 11 # Move win to wsp [10-19]
  bind = $mainMod ALT SHIFT, 2, movetoworkspace, 12
  bind = $mainMod ALT SHIFT, 3, movetoworkspace, 13
  bind = $mainMod ALT SHIFT, 4, movetoworkspace, 14
  bind = $mainMod ALT SHIFT, 5, movetoworkspace, 15
  bind = $mainMod ALT SHIFT, 6, movetoworkspace, 16
  bind = $mainMod ALT SHIFT, 7, movetoworkspace, 17
  bind = $mainMod ALT SHIFT, 8, movetoworkspace, 18
  bind = $mainMod ALT SHIFT, 9, movetoworkspace, 19
  bind = $mainMod ALT SHIFT, 0, movetoworkspace, 20

# Media control
  bind = CTRL SHIFT, SPACE, exec, playerctl play-pause # Play/Pause
  bind = CTRL SHIFT, bracketleft, exec, playerctl previous # Play previous song
  bind = CTRL SHIFT, bracketright, exec, playerctl next # Play next song
  bindl = , XF86AudioNext, exec, playerctl next
  bindl = , XF86AudioPrev, exec, playerctl previous
  bindl = , XF86AudioPause, exec, playerctl play-pause 
  bindl = , XF86AudioPlay, exec, playerctl play-pause

# Hardware buttons (the function keys)
  bind = , XF86AudioRaiseVolume, exec, swayosd-client --output-volume raise
  bind = , XF86AudioLowerVolume, exec, swayosd-client --output-volume lower
  bind = , XF86AudioMute, exec, swayosd-client --output-volume mute-toggle
  bind = , XF86AudioMicMute, exec, swayosd-client --input-volume mute-toggle
  bind = , XF86MonBrightnessUp, exec, swayosd-client --brightness raise
  bind = , XF86MonBrightnessDown, exec, swayosd-client --brightness lower

  bindl = , XF86AudioNext, exec, playerctl next
  bindl = , XF86AudioPause, exec, playerctl play-pause
  bindl = , XF86AudioPlay, exec, playerctl play-pause
  bindl = , XF86AudioPrev, exec, playerctl previous

  bind = SHIFT, Print, exec, sh -c "~/.config/hypr/scripts/take-static-screenshot.sh 1" # Take screenshot (editable)

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Vardio — You Run Your Business. We Run Everything Else.</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Syne:wght@400;500;600;700;800&family=Outfit:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root {
    --black: #050505;
    --white: #f5f5f0;
    --green: #10b981;
    --green-dim: #059669;
    --green-glow: rgba(16,185,129,0.15);
    --green-line: rgba(16,185,129,0.3);
    --gray: #888880;
    --dark: #111110;
    --card: #0d0d0c;
  }

  *, *::before, *::after { margin:0; padding:0; box-sizing:border-box; }

  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; font-size: 16px; }

  body {
    background: var(--black);
    color: var(--white);
    font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 400;
    line-height: 1.6;
    overflow-x: hidden;
    cursor: none;
  }

  /* CUSTOM CURSOR */
  .cursor {
    position: fixed; top:0; left:0; width:10px; height:10px;
    background: var(--green); border-radius:50%; pointer-events:none;
    z-index:9999; transform:translate(-50%,-50%);
    transition: transform 0.1s ease, width 0.3s ease, height 0.3s ease, background 0.3s ease;
    mix-blend-mode: normal;
  }
  .cursor-ring {
    position: fixed; top:0; left:0; width:36px; height:36px;
    border: 1px solid rgba(16,185,129,0.5); border-radius:50%; pointer-events:none;
    z-index:9998; transform:translate(-50%,-50%);
    transition: transform 0.15s ease, width 0.3s ease, height 0.3s ease, opacity 0.3s ease;
  }
  .cursor.hover { width:6px; height:6px; background: var(--green); }
  .cursor-ring.hover { width:56px; height:56px; border-color: var(--green); }

  /* NOISE OVERLAY */
  body::before {
    content:''; position:fixed; inset:0;
    background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='n'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.9' numOctaves='4' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23n)' opacity='0.03'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");
    pointer-events:none; z-index:0; opacity:0.4;
  }

  /* NAV */
  nav {
    position: fixed; top:0; left:0; right:0; z-index:1000;
    padding: 1.5rem 4rem;
    display: flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between;
    background: transparent;
    transition: background 0.4s ease, padding 0.4s ease;
  }
  nav.scrolled {
    background: rgba(5,5,5,0.92);
    backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
    padding: 1rem 4rem;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(16,185,129,0.1);
  }
  .nav-logo {
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; font-weight:800; font-size:1.4rem;
    color: var(--white); text-decoration:none; letter-spacing:0.05em;
  }
  .nav-logo span { color: var(--green); }
  .nav-links { display:flex; gap:2.5rem; list-style:none; }
  .nav-links a {
    color: var(--gray); text-decoration:none; font-size:0.85rem;
    font-weight:500; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase;
    transition: color 0.3s ease; position:relative;
  }
  .nav-links a::after {
    content:''; position:absolute; bottom:-3px; left:0; right:0; height:1px;
    background: var(--green); transform:scaleX(0); transform-origin:left;
    transition: transform 0.3s ease;
  }
  .nav-links a:hover { color:var(--white); }
  .nav-links a:hover::after { transform:scaleX(1); }
  .nav-cta {
    background: var(--green); color: #000; padding:0.6rem 1.4rem;
    border-radius:2px; font-weight:600; font-size:0.8rem; letter-spacing:0.06em;
    text-transform:uppercase; text-decoration:none;
    transition: background 0.3s ease, transform 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease;
  }
  .nav-cta:hover {
    background: #0ea371; transform:translateY(-1px);
    box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(16,185,129,0.3);
  }

  /* HERO */
  #hero {
    min-height: 100vh; display:flex; align-items:center;
    padding: 8rem 4rem 6rem;
    position:relative; overflow:hidden;
  }
  .hero-bg {
    position:absolute; inset:0; pointer-events:none;
    background: radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 60% at 70% 50%, rgba(16,185,129,0.06) 0%, transparent 70%);
  }
  .hero-grid {
    position:absolute; inset:0; pointer-events:none;
    background-image:
      linear-gradient(rgba(16,185,129,0.04) 1px, transparent 1px),
      linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(16,185,129,0.04) 1px, transparent 1px);
    background-size: 60px 60px;
    mask-image: radial-gradient(ellipse at 70% 50%, black 30%, transparent 70%);
  }
  .hero-content { position:relative; z-index:1; max-width:900px; }
  .hero-eyebrow {
    font-size:0.75rem; font-weight:500; letter-spacing:0.2em; text-transform:uppercase;
    color:var(--green); margin-bottom:2rem; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:1rem;
    opacity:0; transform:translateY(20px);
    animation: fadeUp 0.8s ease forwards 0.2s;
  }
  .hero-eyebrow::before {
    content:''; display:block; width:40px; height:1px; background:var(--green);
  }
  .hero-headline {
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; font-weight:800;
    font-size: clamp(3rem, 7vw, 6.5rem);
    line-height: 1.0; letter-spacing:-0.02em;
    margin-bottom:2rem;
  }
  .hero-headline .line {
    display:block; overflow:hidden;
  }
  .hero-headline .line span {
    display:block; opacity:0; transform:translateY(100%);
    animation: slideUp 0.9s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1) forwards;
  }
  .hero-headline .line:nth-child(1) span { animation-delay: 0.4s; }
  .hero-headline .line:nth-child(2) span { animation-delay: 0.55s; }
  .hero-headline .line:nth-child(3) span { animation-delay: 0.7s; color:var(--green); }
  .hero-sub {
    font-size: clamp(1rem, 1.5vw, 1.15rem); color:var(--gray); max-width:560px;
    line-height:1.8; margin-bottom:3rem;
    opacity:0; transform:translateY(20px);
    animation: fadeUp 0.8s ease forwards 1s;
  }
  .hero-actions {
    display:flex; gap:1.5rem; align-items:center;
    opacity:0; transform:translateY(20px);
    animation: fadeUp 0.8s ease forwards 1.2s;
  }
  .btn-primary {
    background: var(--green); color:#000; padding:1rem 2.2rem;
    border-radius:2px; font-weight:700; font-size:0.85rem; letter-spacing:0.08em;
    text-transform:uppercase; text-decoration:none; display:inline-block;
    transition: all 0.3s ease; position:relative; overflow:hidden;
  }
  .btn-primary::before {
    content:''; position:absolute; inset:0;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.15); transform:translateX(-100%);
    transition: transform 0.4s ease;
  }
  .btn-primary:hover { transform:translateY(-2px); box-shadow:0 16px 40px rgba(16,185,129,0.35); }
  .btn-primary:hover::before { transform:translateX(0); }
  .btn-ghost {
    color:var(--white); font-size:0.85rem; letter-spacing:0.08em;
    text-transform:uppercase; text-decoration:none; font-weight:500;
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:0.6rem; transition:color 0.3s ease;
  }
  .btn-ghost span { font-size:1.2rem; transition:transform 0.3s ease; }
  .btn-ghost:hover { color:var(--green); }
  .btn-ghost:hover span { transform:translateX(4px); }
  .hero-scroll {
    position:absolute; bottom:3rem; left:4rem; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:1rem;
    opacity:0; animation: fadeUp 0.8s ease forwards 1.5s;
  }
  .scroll-line {
    width:1px; height:60px; background: linear-gradient(to bottom, var(--green), transparent);
    animation: scrollPulse 2s ease infinite;
  }
  .scroll-text { font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.15em; color:var(--gray); text-transform:uppercase; writing-mode:vertical-lr; }
  .hero-counter {
    position:absolute; bottom:3rem; right:4rem;
    display:flex; gap:3rem;
    opacity:0; animation: fadeUp 0.8s ease forwards 1.6s;
  }
  .counter-item { text-align:right; }
  .counter-num {
    font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-weight:800; font-size:2.2rem;
    color:var(--white); line-height:1; margin-bottom:0.3rem;
  }
  .counter-num span { color:var(--green); }
  .counter-label { font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.12em; color:var(--gray); text-transform:uppercase; }

  /* SECTIONS */
  section { position:relative; z-index:1; }
  .section-inner { max-width:1200px; margin:0 auto; padding:0 4rem; }
  .section-pad { padding-top:8rem; padding-bottom:8rem; }

  /* SECTION LABEL */
  .s-label {
    font-size:0.7rem; font-weight:500; letter-spacing:0.2em; text-transform:uppercase;
    color:var(--green); margin-bottom:1.5rem; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:1rem;
  }
  .s-label::before { content:''; display:block; width:28px; height:1px; background:var(--green); }

  /* MARQUEE */
  .marquee-wrap {
    border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
    border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
    padding:1.2rem 0; overflow:hidden; background:var(--dark);
  }
  .marquee-track {
    display:flex; gap:0; width:max-content;
    animation: marqueeScroll 25s linear infinite;
  }
  .marquee-item {
    white-space:nowrap; padding:0 3rem; font-size:0.75rem; font-weight:500;
    letter-spacing:0.15em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--gray);
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:3rem;
  }
  .marquee-item::after { content:'✦'; color:var(--green); font-size:0.5rem; margin-left:0; }

  /* PROBLEM SECTION */
  #problem { background: var(--black); }
  .problem-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:6rem; align-items:center; }
  .problem-visual {
    position:relative; height:500px;
  }
  .p-card {
    position:absolute; background:var(--card); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
    border-radius:4px; padding:1.5rem; width:280px;
    opacity:0; transform:translateY(30px) scale(0.96);
    transition: all 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1);
  }
  .p-card.visible { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0) scale(1); }
  .p-card:nth-child(1) { top:0; left:0; transition-delay:0s; }
  .p-card:nth-child(2) { top:120px; left:80px; transition-delay:0.15s; border-color:rgba(16,185,129,0.2); }
  .p-card:nth-child(3) { top:260px; left:20px; transition-delay:0.3s; }
  .p-card:nth-child(4) { top:340px; left:120px; transition-delay:0.45s; }
  .p-card-icon { color:var(--green); font-size:1.2rem; margin-bottom:0.6rem; }
  .p-card-title { font-size:0.8rem; font-weight:600; color:var(--white); margin-bottom:0.3rem; }
  .p-card-body { font-size:0.75rem; color:var(--gray); line-height:1.5; }
  .problem-text h2 {
    font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-weight:800;
    font-size:clamp(2rem,4vw,3.5rem); line-height:1.1; margin-bottom:2rem;
  }
  .problem-text h2 em { color:var(--green); font-style:normal; }
  .pain-list { list-style:none; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:1rem; }
  .pain-list li {
    display:flex; gap:1rem; align-items:flex-start;
    padding:1rem 1.2rem; background:var(--card);
    border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05); border-radius:3px;
    font-size:0.9rem; color:var(--gray); line-height:1.5;
    opacity:0; transform:translateX(30px);
    transition: all 0.5s ease;
  }
  .pain-list li.visible { opacity:1; transform:translateX(0); }
  .pain-list li::before { content:'✕'; color:#ef4444; font-size:0.75rem; margin-top:2px; flex-shrink:0; }

  /* HOW IT WORKS */
  #how { background: var(--dark); }
  .steps-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr); gap:2px; margin-top:4rem; }
  .step-card {
    background:var(--card); padding:3rem 2.5rem; position:relative; overflow:hidden;
    opacity:0; transform:translateY(40px);
    transition: all 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1);
  }
  .step-card.visible { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0); }
  .step-card:nth-child(1) { transition-delay:0s; }
  .step-card:nth-child(2) { transition-delay:0.15s; }
  .step-card:nth-child(3) { transition-delay:0.3s; }
  .step-card::before {
    content:''; position:absolute; bottom:0; left:0; right:0; height:2px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--green), transparent);
    transform:scaleX(0); transform-origin:left; transition:transform 0.4s ease;
  }
  .step-card:hover::before { transform:scaleX(1); }
  .step-card:hover { background:#111110; }
  .step-num {
    font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-size:4rem; font-weight:800;
    color:rgba(16,185,129,0.12); line-height:1; margin-bottom:2rem;
    transition:color 0.3s ease;
  }
  .step-card:hover .step-num { color:rgba(16,185,129,0.25); }
  .step-title {
    font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-size:1.3rem; font-weight:700;
    margin-bottom:1rem; color:var(--white);
  }
  .step-title span { color:var(--green); }
  .step-body { font-size:0.9rem; color:var(--gray); line-height:1.7; }

  /* SERVICES */
  #services { background:var(--black); }
  .services-header { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:4rem; margin-bottom:5rem; }
  .services-header h2 {
    font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-weight:800;
    font-size:clamp(2rem,4vw,3.2rem); line-height:1.1;
  }
  .services-header p { color:var(--gray); font-size:1rem; line-height:1.8; align-self:end; }
  .service-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr); gap:1px; background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05); }
  .service-item {
    background:var(--black); padding:2.5rem; position:relative;
    overflow:hidden; cursor:default;
    opacity:0; transform:translateY(30px);
    transition: all 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1);
  }
  .service-item.visible { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0); }
  .service-item:nth-child(1){transition-delay:0s} .service-item:nth-child(2){transition-delay:0.08s}
  .service-item:nth-child(3){transition-delay:0.16s} .service-item:nth-child(4){transition-delay:0.24s}
  .service-item:nth-child(5){transition-delay:0.32s} .service-item:nth-child(6){transition-delay:0.40s}
  .service-bg-glow {
    position:absolute; inset:0;
    background: radial-gradient(circle at 0% 100%, rgba(16,185,129,0.08) 0%, transparent 60%);
    opacity:0; transition:opacity 0.4s ease;
  }
  .service-item:hover .service-bg-glow { opacity:1; }
  .service-icon {
    width:44px; height:44px; border:1px solid rgba(16,185,129,0.3);
    border-radius:4px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
    font-size:1.1rem; margin-bottom:1.5rem; transition:all 0.3s ease;
    position:relative; z-index:1;
  }
  .service-item:hover .service-icon {
    background:var(--green); border-color:var(--green);
  }
  .service-name {
    font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-size:1rem; font-weight:700;
    margin-bottom:0.8rem; color:var(--white); position:relative; z-index:1;
  }
  .service-desc { font-size:0.85rem; color:var(--gray); line-height:1.7; position:relative; z-index:1; }
  .service-arrow {
    display:block; margin-top:1.5rem; color:var(--green); font-size:1rem;
    opacity:0; transform:translateX(-10px);
    transition:all 0.3s ease; position:relative; z-index:1;
  }
  .service-item:hover .service-arrow { opacity:1; transform:translateX(0); }

  /* PRICING */
  #pricing { background:var(--dark); }
  .pricing-header { text-align:center; margin-bottom:5rem; }
  .pricing-header h2 {
    font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-weight:800;
    font-size:clamp(2rem,4vw,3.5rem); margin-bottom:1rem;
  }
  .pricing-header p { color:var(--gray); font-size:1rem; max-width:480px; margin:0 auto; }
  .pricing-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr); gap:1px; background:rgba(255,255,255,0.06); }
  .price-card {
    background:var(--card); padding:2.5rem 2rem; position:relative; overflow:hidden;
    display:flex; flex-direction:column;
    opacity:0; transform:translateY(40px);
    transition: all 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1);
  }
  .price-card.visible { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0); }
  .price-card:nth-child(1){transition-delay:0s} .price-card:nth-child(2){transition-delay:0.1s}
  .price-card:nth-child(3){transition-delay:0.2s} .price-card:nth-child(4){transition-delay:0.3s}
  .price-card.featured {
    background: linear-gradient(160deg, #0d1f18 0%, #0a1a14 100%);
    border:1px solid rgba(16,185,129,0.4);
    z-index:2;
  }
  .price-card.featured .price-card-glow {
    position:absolute; inset:0; opacity:1;
    background:radial-gradient(circle at 50% 0%, rgba(16,185,129,0.1) 0%, transparent 60%);
  }
  .popular-badge {
    position:absolute; top:0; right:0;
    background:var(--green); color:#000; font-size:0.65rem; font-weight:700;
    letter-spacing:0.12em; text-transform:uppercase; padding:0.35rem 0.9rem;
    border-bottom-left-radius:4px;
  }
  .price-tier { font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.18em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--green); margin-bottom:1rem; font-weight:500; }
  .price-name { font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-size:1.3rem; font-weight:800; margin-bottom:0.5rem; }
  .price-tagline { font-size:0.8rem; color:var(--gray); margin-bottom:2rem; line-height:1.5; min-height:3rem; }
  .price-amount {
    margin-bottom:2rem; padding-bottom:2rem;
    border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
  }
  .price-currency { font-size:1.2rem; color:var(--green); font-weight:600; vertical-align:top; margin-top:8px; display:inline-block; }
  .price-num {
    font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-size:3rem; font-weight:800; line-height:1;
    color:var(--white);
  }
  .price-period { font-size:0.8rem; color:var(--gray); display:block; margin-top:0.3rem; }
  .price-features { list-style:none; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:0.7rem; flex:1; margin-bottom:2rem; }
  .price-features li { display:flex; gap:0.8rem; align-items:flex-start; font-size:0.82rem; color:var(--gray); }
  .price-features li::before { content:'✓'; color:var(--green); font-weight:700; flex-shrink:0; margin-top:1px; }
  .price-features li.dim::before { content:'—'; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.2); }
  .price-features li.dim { color:rgba(255,255,255,0.2); }
  .price-btn {
    display:block; text-align:center; padding:0.9rem;
    border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); color:var(--white);
    text-decoration:none; font-size:0.8rem; font-weight:600; letter-spacing:0.08em;
    text-transform:uppercase; border-radius:2px;
    transition:all 0.3s ease; margin-top:auto;
  }
  .price-btn:hover { border-color:var(--green); color:var(--green); }
  .price-card.featured .price-btn {
    background:var(--green); border-color:var(--green); color:#000;
  }
  .price-card.featured .price-btn:hover {
    background:#0ea371; box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(16,185,129,0.3);
  }
  .pricing-note {
    text-align:center; margin-top:2.5rem; font-size:0.82rem; color:var(--gray);
    padding:1.2rem; background:rgba(16,185,129,0.05); border:1px solid rgba(16,185,129,0.12);
    border-radius:3px;
  }
  .pricing-note strong { color:var(--green); }

  /* WHO WE SERVE */
  #who { background:var(--black); }
  .who-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr); gap:2rem; margin-top:4rem; }
  .who-card {
    padding:3rem; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06); border-radius:4px;
    position:relative; overflow:hidden;
    opacity:0; transform:translateY(30px);
    transition:all 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1);
  }
  .who-card.visible { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0); }
  .who-card:nth-child(1){transition-delay:0s}.who-card:nth-child(2){transition-delay:0.15s}.who-card:nth-child(3){transition-delay:0.3s}
  .who-card::before {
    content:''; position:absolute; top:0; left:0; right:0; height:2px;
    background:var(--green); transform:scaleX(0); transform-origin:left;
    transition:transform 0.5s ease;
  }
  .who-card:hover::before { transform:scaleX(1); }
  .who-emoji { font-size:2rem; margin-bottom:1.5rem; }
  .who-title { font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-size:1.2rem; font-weight:700; margin-bottom:1rem; }
  .who-body { font-size:0.88rem; color:var(--gray); line-height:1.7; }

  /* ABOUT */
  #about { background:var(--dark); }
  .about-layout { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:8rem; align-items:center; }
  .about-text h2 {
    font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-weight:800;
    font-size:clamp(2rem,3.5vw,3rem); line-height:1.1; margin-bottom:2rem;
  }
  .about-text p { color:var(--gray); font-size:0.95rem; line-height:1.8; margin-bottom:1.5rem; }
  .about-text .green-quote {
    border-left:2px solid var(--green); padding-left:1.5rem; margin:2rem 0;
    font-size:1.1rem; color:var(--white); line-height:1.6; font-weight:300; font-style:italic;
  }
  .values-list { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:1.5rem; }
  .value-item {
    display:flex; gap:1.5rem; align-items:flex-start;
    padding:1.5rem; background:var(--card); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
    border-radius:3px;
    opacity:0; transform:translateX(30px);
    transition:all 0.5s ease;
  }
  .value-item.visible { opacity:1; transform:translateX(0); }
  .value-item:nth-child(1){transition-delay:0s}.value-item:nth-child(2){transition-delay:0.12s}
  .value-item:nth-child(3){transition-delay:0.24s}.value-item:nth-child(4){transition-delay:0.36s}
  .value-icon { color:var(--green); font-size:1.2rem; flex-shrink:0; margin-top:2px; }
  .value-title { font-size:0.9rem; font-weight:600; color:var(--white); margin-bottom:0.3rem; }
  .value-desc { font-size:0.82rem; color:var(--gray); line-height:1.5; }

  /* CTA BAND */
  #cta-band {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #050e0a 0%, #081a10 50%, #050e0a 100%);
    border-top:1px solid rgba(16,185,129,0.15);
    border-bottom:1px solid rgba(16,185,129,0.15);
    padding:8rem 4rem; text-align:center; position:relative; overflow:hidden;
  }
  .cta-bg {
    position:absolute; inset:0;
    background:radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 70% at 50% 50%, rgba(16,185,129,0.07) 0%, transparent 70%);
    pointer-events:none;
  }
  #cta-band h2 {
    font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-weight:800;
    font-size:clamp(2.5rem,5vw,5rem); line-height:1.0; margin-bottom:1.5rem;
    position:relative; z-index:1;
  }
  #cta-band h2 em { color:var(--green); font-style:normal; display:block; }
  #cta-band p { color:var(--gray); font-size:1rem; max-width:480px; margin:0 auto 3rem; position:relative; z-index:1; }
  #cta-band .btn-primary { font-size:0.9rem; padding:1.2rem 2.8rem; position:relative; z-index:1; }

  /* CONTACT */
  #contact { background:var(--black); }
  .contact-layout { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:8rem; }
  .contact-text h2 {
    font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-weight:800;
    font-size:clamp(2rem,3.5vw,3rem); line-height:1.1; margin-bottom:1.5rem;
  }
  .contact-text p { color:var(--gray); font-size:0.95rem; line-height:1.8; margin-bottom:2.5rem; }
  .contact-details { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:1rem; }
  .contact-item {
    display:flex; gap:1rem; align-items:center;
    padding:1.2rem 1.5rem; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
    border-radius:3px; text-decoration:none; color:var(--gray); font-size:0.9rem;
    transition:all 0.3s ease;
  }
  .contact-item:hover { border-color:rgba(16,185,129,0.3); color:var(--white); background:rgba(16,185,129,0.04); }
  .contact-item .ci-label { font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.1em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--green); display:block; margin-bottom:0.2rem; }
  .contact-form { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:1.2rem; }
  .form-group { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:0.5rem; }
  .form-label { font-size:0.72rem; letter-spacing:0.1em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--gray); font-weight:500; }
  .form-input, .form-select, .form-textarea {
    background: var(--card); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    color:var(--white); padding:0.9rem 1.1rem; border-radius:2px;
    font-family:'Outfit',sans-serif; font-size:0.9rem;
    transition:border-color 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease;
    outline:none; width:100%;
  }
  .form-input:focus, .form-select:focus, .form-textarea:focus {
    border-color:rgba(16,185,129,0.5);
    box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(16,185,129,0.08);
  }
  .form-select option { background:var(--dark); }
  .form-textarea { resize:vertical; min-height:100px; }
  .form-submit {
    background:var(--green); color:#000; border:none; padding:1rem 2rem;
    font-family:'Outfit',sans-serif; font-size:0.85rem; font-weight:700;
    letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; border-radius:2px;
    cursor:none; transition:all 0.3s ease;
  }
  .form-submit:hover { background:#0ea371; box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(16,185,129,0.3); transform:translateY(-1px); }

  /* FOOTER */
  footer {
    background:var(--dark); border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
    padding:4rem; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center;
  }
  .footer-brand { font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-weight:800; font-size:1.2rem; }
  .footer-brand span { color:var(--green); }
  .footer-tagline { font-size:0.8rem; color:var(--gray); margin-top:0.4rem; }
  .footer-links { display:flex; gap:2rem; }
  .footer-links a { font-size:0.8rem; color:var(--gray); text-decoration:none; transition:color 0.3s ease; }
  .footer-links a:hover { color:var(--green); }
  .footer-copy { font-size:0.75rem; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.2); }

  /* REVEAL ANIMATIONS */
  .reveal {
    opacity:0; transform:translateY(40px);
    transition:all 0.7s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1);
  }
  .reveal.visible { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0); }
  .reveal-left { opacity:0; transform:translateX(-40px); transition:all 0.7s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); }
  .reveal-left.visible { opacity:1; transform:translateX(0); }

  /* KEYFRAMES */
  @keyframes fadeUp {
    to { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0); }
  }
  @keyframes slideUp {
    to { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0); }
  }
  @keyframes scrollPulse {
    0%,100% { opacity:1; transform:scaleY(1); }
    50% { opacity:0.4; transform:scaleY(0.7); }
  }
  @keyframes marqueeScroll {
    from { transform:translateX(0); }
    to { transform:translateX(-50%); }
  }
  @keyframes float {
    0%,100% { transform:translateY(0); }
    50% { transform:translateY(-10px); }
  }
  @keyframes pulse-ring {
    0% { transform:translate(-50%,-50%) scale(0.8); opacity:0.8; }
    100% { transform:translate(-50%,-50%) scale(1.5); opacity:0; }
  }
  @keyframes spin-slow {
    from { transform:rotate(0deg); }
    to { transform:rotate(360deg); }
  }

  /* DECORATIVE ORBS */
  .orb {
    position:absolute; border-radius:50%; pointer-events:none;
    background:radial-gradient(circle, rgba(16,185,129,0.12) 0%, transparent 70%);
    animation:float 6s ease-in-out infinite;
  }

  /* SCROLLBAR */
  ::-webkit-scrollbar { width:3px; }
  ::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background:var(--black); }
  ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background:var(--green-dim); border-radius:2px; }

  /* SELECTION */
  ::selection { background:rgba(16,185,129,0.3); color:var(--white); }

  /* GREEN TEXT */
  .green { color:var(--green); }

  @media(max-width:1100px) {
    .pricing-grid { grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr); }
    nav { padding:1.5rem 2rem; }
    .section-inner { padding:0 2rem; }
    #hero { padding:8rem 2rem 6rem; }
  }
  @media(max-width:768px) {
    nav .nav-links, nav .nav-cta { display:none; }
    .problem-grid, .services-header, .about-layout, .contact-layout { grid-template-columns:1fr; gap:3rem; }
    .steps-grid, .who-grid, .service-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
    .pricing-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
    .hero-counter { position:static; margin-top:3rem; justify-content:flex-start; }
    .hero-scroll { display:none; }
    footer { flex-direction:column; gap:2rem; text-align:center; }
    .footer-links { flex-wrap:wrap; justify-content:center; }
  }
</style>
</head>

<!-- HERO -->

<!-- PROBLEM -->
<section id="problem" class="section-pad">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="problem-grid">
      <div class="problem-visual">
        <div class="p-card" id="pc1">
          <div class="p-card-icon">⏰</div>
          <div class="p-card-title">11 PM — Someone searches your service</div>
          <div class="p-card-body">You're closed. Your competitor answers. They book.</div>
        </div>
        <div class="p-card" id="pc2" style="border-color:rgba(16,185,129,0.25)">
          <div class="p-card-icon">📱</div>
          <div class="p-card-title">DM received 3 hours ago</div>
          <div class="p-card-body">You see it now. They've already moved on.</div>
        </div>
        <div class="p-card" id="pc3">
          <div class="p-card-icon">🎬</div>
          <div class="p-card-title">4 hours editing one video</div>

        </div>
        <div class="p-card" id="pc4">
          <div class="p-card-icon">💸</div>
          <div class="p-card-title">₹20k/month on ads</div>
          <div class="p-card-body">No follow-up system. Most leads go cold.</div>
        </div>

      <div class="problem-text">
        <div class="s-label reveal">The Problem</div>
        <h2 class="reveal">Every hour you spend on marketing is an hour <em>stolen</em> from your real work.</h2>
        <ul class="pain-list">
          <li id="pl1">Leads reaching out after hours go unanswered and disappear forever</li>
          <li id="pl2">Content creation is eating 10+ hours a week with no system</li>
          <li id="pl3">Your social media is inconsistent because you're too busy to post</li>
          <li id="pl4">You know you need better marketing but have no time to fix it</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>

<!-- HOW IT WORKS -->
<section id="how" class="section-pad">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="s-label reveal">How It Works</div>
    <h2 class="reveal" style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:clamp(2rem,4vw,3.2rem);max-width:500px;line-height:1.1;margin-bottom:1rem;">Three Steps to Full Autopilot.</h2>
    <p class="reveal" style="color:var(--gray);font-size:1rem;max-width:480px;margin-bottom:0;line-height:1.8;">We take you from scattered marketing efforts to a single machine that runs without you.</p>
    <div class="steps-grid">
      <div class="step-card">
        <div class="step-num">01</div>
        <div class="step-title"><span>Strategy</span> Call</div>
        <div class="step-body">We learn your business, audience, and goals. We map exactly what needs to be built — and what's currently draining your time.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="step-card">
        <div class="step-num">02</div>
        <div class="step-title">We <span>Build</span> Your System</div>
        <div class="step-body">Landing pages. Automations. Content pipelines. Ad campaigns. Built in two weeks. Connected as one machine that runs on autopilot.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="step-card">
        <div class="step-num">03</div>
        <div class="step-title">You <span>Focus</span> on Your Work</div>
        <div class="step-body">The system runs. Leads come in. Content goes out. Customers get answered. You do the work only you can do. We handle everything around it.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- SERVICES -->
<section id="services" class="section-pad">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="services-header">
      <div>
        <div class="s-label reveal">What We Do</div>
        <h2 class="reveal">Everything Your Brand Needs.<br>One Team.</h2>
      </div>
      <p class="reveal" style="align-self:end">Most businesses waste weeks coordinating three different vendors and still end up with a patchy digital presence. We replace all of them with one integrated team that builds toward one goal.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="service-grid">
      <div class="service-item">
        <div class="service-bg-glow"></div>
        <div class="service-icon">🌐</div>
        <div class="service-name">Website Design & Development</div>
        <div class="service-desc">High-converting websites and landing pages that capture leads, build trust, and close customers — built to perform, not just look good.</div>
        <span class="service-arrow">→ View details</span>
      </div>
      <div class="service-item">
        <div class="service-bg-glow"></div>
        <div class="service-icon">🤖</div>
        <div class="service-name">AI Automation Systems</div>
        <div class="service-desc">One pipeline posts your content everywhere automatically. AI calling agents handle enquiries 24/7. You stop doing repetitive work forever.</div>
        <span class="service-arrow">→ View details</span>
      </div>
      <div class="service-item">
        <div class="service-bg-glow"></div>
        <div class="service-icon">📱</div>
        <div class="service-name">Social Media Management</div>
        <div class="service-desc">12–20 posts per month, community management, content strategy — your social presence runs professionally without you touching it.</div>
        <span class="service-arrow">→ View details</span>
      </div>
      <div class="service-item">
        <div class="service-bg-glow"></div>
        <div class="service-icon">🎬</div>
        <div class="service-name">Video Editing & Production</div>
        <div class="service-desc">You record. We edit, caption, format, and deliver scroll-stopping content across every platform. Built for creators and influencers.</div>
        <span class="service-arrow">→ View details</span>
      </div>
      <div class="service-item">
        <div class="service-bg-glow"></div>
        <div class="service-icon">📈</div>
        <div class="service-name">Paid Advertising</div>
        <div class="service-desc">Meta, Google, and YouTube ad campaigns that bring qualified customers — not just traffic. Strategy, creative, and optimisation included.</div>
        <span class="service-arrow">→ View details</span>
      </div>
      <div class="service-item">
        <div class="service-bg-glow"></div>
        <div class="service-icon">✍️</div>

# dotfiles 🚀

My personal Arch Linux + Hyprland dotfiles.

## Install
```bash
git clone git@github.com:sanathpedapudi24/dotfiles.git && cd dotfiles && ./install.sh
```

## What's included
- Hyprland + Waybar
- Kitty terminal
- Neovim
- Zsh
- Rofi
- And much more...

#!/bin/bash

echo "==> Installing yay (AUR helper)..."
if ! command -v yay &> /dev/null; then
    git clone https://aur.archlinux.org/yay.git /tmp/yay
    cd /tmp/yay && makepkg -si
    cd -
fi

echo "==> Installing packages..."
yay -S --needed - < packages.txt

echo "==> Linking configs..."
DOTFILES_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "$0")" && pwd)"

cp -r "$DOTFILES_DIR"/.config/* ~/.config/

echo "==> Done! Please reboot."
nano ~/dotfiles/install.sh
